result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 12:   JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.creat...
                                           ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS asof,
         (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS from_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS to_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.asof
  WHERE lower(ch.field__c) IN ('owner','ownerid','owner assignment','ownerid__c')
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(coalesce(from_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE coalesce(from_owner,'') <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(coalesce(c.ownerid,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate >= p.start_dt AND c.createddate < p.asof
  WHERE coalesce(c.ownerid,'') <> ''
  UNION ALL
  SELECT regexp_replace(coalesce(oc.from_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes oc
  WHERE coalesce(oc.from_owner,'') <> ''
  UNION ALL
  SELECT regexp_replace(coalesce(oc.to_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes oc
  WHERE coalesce(oc.to_owner,'') <> ''
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM handled_agents
  WHERE agent_id <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
)
SELECT acc.agent_id
FROM agent_case_counts acc
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = acc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, acc.cases_handled DESC, acc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS asof,
         (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS from_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS to_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.asof
  WHERE lower(ch.field__c) IN ('owner','ownerid','owner assignment','ownerid__c')
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(coalesce(from_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE coalesce(from_owner,'') <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(coalesce(c.ownerid,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate >= p.start_dt AND c.createddate < p.asof
  WHERE coalesce(c.ownerid,'') <> ''
  UNION ALL
  SELECT regexp_replace(coalesce(oc.from_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes oc
  WHERE coalesce(oc.from_owner,'') <> ''
  UNION ALL
  SELECT regexp_replace(coalesce(oc.to_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes oc
  WHERE coalesce(oc.to_owner,'') <> ''
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM handled_agents
  WHERE agent_id <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
)
SELECT acc.agent_id
FROM agent_case_counts acc
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = acc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, acc.cases_handled DESC, acc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS asof,
         (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS from_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS to_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.asof
  WHERE lower(ch.field__c) IN ('owner','ownerid','owner assignment','ownerid__c')
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(coalesce(from_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE coalesce(from_owner,'') <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(coalesce(c.ownerid,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate >= p.start_dt AND c.createddate < p.asof
  WHERE coalesce(c.ownerid,'') <> ''
  UNION ALL
  SELECT regexp_replace(coalesce(oc.from_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes oc
  WHERE coalesce(oc.from_owner,'') <> ''
  UNION ALL
  SELECT regexp_replace(coalesce(oc.to_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes oc
  WHERE coalesce(oc.to_owner,'') <> ''
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM handled_agents
  WHERE agent_id <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
)
SELECT acc.agent_id
FROM agent_case_counts acc
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = acc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, acc.cases_handled DESC, acc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' AS asof,
         (TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS from_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS to_owner,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.asof
  WHERE lower(ch.field__c) IN ('owner','ownerid','owner assignment','ownerid__c')
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(coalesce(from_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE coalesce(from_owner,'') <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(coalesce(c.ownerid,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt AND c.createddate::timestamp < p.asof
  WHERE coalesce(c.ownerid,'') <> ''
  UNION ALL
  SELECT regexp_replace(coalesce(oc.from_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes oc
  WHERE coalesce(oc.from_owner,'') <> ''
  UNION ALL
  SELECT regexp_replace(coalesce(oc.to_owner,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes oc
  WHERE coalesce(oc.to_owner,'') <> ''
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM handled_agents
  WHERE agent_id <> ''
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
)
SELECT acc.agent_id
FROM agent_case_counts acc
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = acc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, acc.cases_handled DESC, acc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
